summary: Issue #882 is open, non-security-sensitive, and still valid on current main 87dc3dc79d7c3e9a844cdb2f09773735a76c4f18. Source inspection still shows no tray-side NO_REPLY suppression guard for live assistant chat events or chat.history assistant rows. Implementation and validation are blocked because this worker filesystem is read-only, so no branch change or PR can be produced directly; a narrow fix artifact is emitted for the applicator/executor.

actions.reason: A narrow implementation remains appropriate: suppress exact/trimmed assistant NO_REPLY directives in the tray provider before visible timeline entries are created, while preserving legitimate user-authored NO_REPLY text.
No active implementation PR exists in the hydrated artifact and allow_fix_pr=true.
Implementation PR creation is blocked by the read-only worker filesystem, not by product ambiguity or security policy.
